artifacts.summary: Official AUT-domain discovery found AI-related event, seminar, competition, and research pages plus journal/faculty ethics pages. This run did not locate a central, binding AUT policy specifically governing generative AI or ChatGPT use.

artifacts.claimText: This official-domain crawl did not produce a substantive AI-use policy claim for Amirkabir University of Technology; the only successfully fetched policy-like official source was journal-scoped publication-ethics material, while AI-specific official results were classified as events, seminars, competitions, or research output rather than policy evidence.

artifacts.notes: Approved as source-status only. It records that this run did not produce a substantive AI-use policy claim from successfully fetched official sources; it is not proof that no AUT policy exists elsewhere.

artifacts.title: Amirkabir University of Technology AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: Official AUT-domain discovery found several AI-related official results that were events, seminars, competitions, or research output rather than binding AI policy. The only successfully fetched policy-like official source was a Persian AUT journal ethics page, so the staged claim is limited to source-status and does not assert an AI policy rule.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Several official AUT pages timed out during Firecrawl and direct HTTP fetch attempts; they were classified from discovery metadata only and rejected as non-policy sources.
The remaining claim is source-status only and should not be read as a definitive absence finding.
No claim in this bundle should be promoted as human-reviewed or canonical without downstream human review.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
